item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-001","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"回答开头明确指出“P99 超标 = 索引没建好”不能当作已验证结论，并要求 APM、slow query log、pg_stat_statements/performance schema、执行计划等证据来锁定慢 SQL。随后给出的索引建议是通用且带验证/上线观察步骤的方案，没有直接把根因定死为索引问题，满足正向唤醒与证据缺口处理要求。"}
